case_title: JACK NUMAN VS. SF TOWN TAXI, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NUMAN, JACK AS TO DEFENDANT SF TOWN TAXI, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2013 - CONTINUED TO FEB-20-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 (LACKS OF P.M. STAFFS). PLAINTIFF WAS NOTIFIED BY PERSONAL TELEPHONE CALL MESSAGE LEFT AT THE NUMBER LISTED ON THE COURT'S RECORD. DEFENDANT WAS NOTIFIED BY TELEPHONE CALL WITH MS. EVE. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SF TOWN TAXI, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACOB MAYZEL--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NUMAN, JACK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SF TOWN TAXI, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
